articles.title: Celtics sign Ron Harper Jr. to multi-year contract
articles.description:
Harper Jr., 26, is on his second stint with the Celtics. He previously spent time with the Raptors and Pistons.

The post Celtics sign Ron Harper Jr. to multi-year contract appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics signed Ron Harper Jr. to a multi-year contract on July 7, 2026.
Harper Jr., 26, returns to the Celtics after previous stints with Raptors and Pistons.
This signing strengthens the Celtics' roster for the upcoming NBA season.

articles.title: ‘Amateur hour’: Mass. sheriff accuses ICE of trying to bully him into breaking the law
articles.description:
Bristol County Sheriff Paul Heroux criticized ICE after federal agents detained a man who had posted bail.

The post ‘Amateur hour’: Mass. sheriff accuses ICE of trying to bully him into breaking the law appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bristol County Sheriff Paul Heroux criticized ICE for detaining a man post-bail.
Heroux accused ICE of attempting to coerce him into illegal actions.
This incident raises concerns about local law enforcement's relationship with federal agencies.

articles.title: The murder of Karina Holmer remains unsolved 30 years later; police asking public for help
articles.description:
Karina Holmer was a 20-year-old au pair from Sweden who ventured out into Boston on a Friday night and became the victim of a grisly murder that has haunted the city ever since. It was June 21, 1996, and that Friday night Holmer went out dancing at Zanzibar, a popular nightclub at Boylston Place, also […]

The post The murder of Karina Holmer remains unsolved 30 years later; police asking public for help appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Karina Holmer, a 20-year-old au pair, was murdered in Boston on June 21, 1996.
The Boston Police Department is seeking public assistance to solve this 30-year-old case.
Holmer's unsolved murder continues to affect community safety and trust in local law enforcement.

articles.title: A toddler was found in a pool and declared dead. He’s alive, and his parents could be charged.
articles.description:
When a team from the local medical examiner's office arrived in a so-called cold room, they found the boy breathing and rushed him to another hospital, police said.

The post A toddler was found in a pool and declared dead. He’s alive, and his parents could be charged. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Local medical examiners found a toddler alive after he was declared dead.
The child was discovered breathing in a cold room and rushed to the hospital.
Parents may face charges for negligence in this incident involving their child.

articles.title: Brad Stevens ‘lost a lot of sleep’ over the Jaylen Brown trade
articles.description:
"Somebody asked me [Monday] if I missed coaching. I said I did this week. This is not for the faint of heart."

The post Brad Stevens ‘lost a lot of sleep’ over the Jaylen Brown trade appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Brad Stevens expressed regret over the Jaylen Brown trade decision this week.
Stevens stated he lost significant sleep, indicating the stress of the trade.
The trade's impact may affect Celtics' performance and fan sentiment in Boston.

articles.title: Who might replace Platner if he drops out? Here’s what could happen.
articles.description:
Graham Platner can be replaced on the ballot if he withdraws in the next week. If he does, Maine Democrats would face an uncertain two-week race to choose a replacement.

The post Who might replace Platner if he drops out? Here’s what could happen. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Graham Platner may withdraw from the ballot within the next week.
Maine Democrats have two weeks to select a replacement candidate if Platner drops out.
Boston residents could face uncertainty in local political representation during the replacement process.

articles.title: Boston Fleet to shift primary venue from Lowell’s Tsongas Center to BU’s Agganis Arena for upcoming season
articles.description:
Agganis’s capacity for hockey is 6,150 — about 350 seats smaller than Tsongas, but on par with the team’s average attendance this season.

The post Boston Fleet to shift primary venue from Lowell’s Tsongas Center to BU’s Agganis Arena for upcoming season appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston Fleet will move home games to BU's Agganis Arena for the upcoming season.
Agganis Arena has a hockey capacity of 6,150, slightly smaller than Tsongas Center.
This venue change aligns with the team's average attendance, enhancing local fan experience.

articles.title: From ‘under the weather’ to ‘scuttlebutt’: The sailing phrases you’ll hear at Sail Boston 250
articles.description:
Before touring Boston’s Tall Ships, learn the nautical words and phrases that sailed into everyday English.

summary: Learn nautical phrases before visiting Boston's Tall Ships at Sail Boston 250.

Understanding sailing terminology enhances the experience for Boston residents and tourists.

articles.title: Bill Belichick was reportedly considered for a temporary head coach role with the Broncos
articles.description:
The plan, conceived of by Denver head coach Sean Payton, was ultimately scrapped.

summary: Bill Belichick was considered for a temporary head coach role with the Broncos.
